units.sanskrit: अहं वृक्षस्य रेरिवा । कीर्तिः पृष्ठं गिरेरिव । ऊर्ध्वपवित्रो वाजिनीव स्वमृतमस्मि । द्रविणꣳसवर्चसम् । सुमेध अमृतोक्षितः । इति त्रिशङ्कोर्वेदानुवचनम् ॥ १ ॥ इति दशमोऽनुवाकः ॥
units.transliteration: ahaṃ vṛkṣasya rerivā | kīrtiḥ pṛṣṭhaṃ gireriva | ūrdhvapavitro vājinīva svamṛtamasmi | draviṇaṃsavarcasam | sumedha amṛtokṣitaḥ | iti triśaṅkorvedānuvacanam || 1 || iti daśamo'nuvākaḥ ||
units.translation: I am the stimulator of the tree of the Universe. My fame (glory) is high as the peaks of the mountains. High and pure am I like the essence in the sun. I am the power and the wealth, effulgent with intuition. Intelligent, imperishable and undecaying am I. This is the sacred recitation of Trishanku, after he realised the Truth.
